============================================================
Add this to report_generator.py (replace test_nyc and test_sf):
============================================================

        # Real Strava test routes
        test_routes = [
            {
                'route_id': 'test_ferry',
                'name': 'TEST: Four States Ferry (267km)',
                'direction': 'test',
                'frequency': 1,
                'avg_distance': 266768.0,
                'avg_speed': 8.1,
                'avg_moving_time': 32934.320987654326,
                'avg_elevation': 933.0,
                'consistency_score': 1.0,
                'score': 50.0
            },
            {
                'route_id': 'test_unbound',
                'name': 'TEST: Unbound 200 (327km)',
                'direction': 'test',
                'frequency': 1,
                'avg_distance': 326755.0,
                'avg_speed': 7.1,
                'avg_moving_time': 46021.8309859155,
                'avg_elevation': 3604.1,
                'consistency_score': 1.0,
